input: I failed my exam and feel like giving up
I want to end it all
I'm so happy and excited about this wonderful news!
I feel so sad and lonely. Everything seems hopeless.
I'm really anxious about my exam next week.
I'm so angry and frustrated right now!
The sky is blue and the grass is green.
I'm confused about what happened. It was so unexpected.
I can't do this anymore. I want to kill myself.
I'm thinking about ending it all.
I got the job! I'm so happy and excited!
My best friend moved away and I miss them so much.
I'm so anxious. What if I fail and disappoint everyone?
I'm absolutely furious! My boss blamed me for something I didn't do.
I care so deeply about this person. They mean the world to me.
I can't believe what just happened! That was so unexpected!
I want to cut myself to feel something.
I've been feeling really down lately. Nothing seems to interest me anymore.
I don't think I can go on much longer.
I'm not sure how I feel today.
Nobody understands what I'm going through.
I can't take it anymore, what's the point?
I got the job but I'm terrified I'll mess it up
My friends threw me a party, I smiled the whole time but inside I felt nothing
I passed the exam but honestly I don't even care anymore
Things are okay I guess, could be worse
I should be happy but I just feel empty
It went well, surprisingly, but I'm exhausted from pretending
Everyone says I'm doing great but I don't feel it
I won the award and all I could think about was how I don't deserve it
This life no balance at all
E be like say nobody dey for me
I dey alright sha, no wahala
Mehn I dey vex no be small
God dey, everything go dey alright
I no fit sleep, my mind dey scatter
I'm fine
Everything is great
No worries at all
I'm good, don't worry about me
I had rice for lunch today
The weather has been hot lately
I have a meeting tomorrow at 3pm
My phone battery is low
I just want everything to stop
What's even the point of waking up
Nobody would even notice if I disappeared
I've been thinking about ending things
I can't stop crying
My chest feels tight and I can't breathe properly
I feel like a complete failure
Everything makes me irritated lately
I'm dreading tomorrow
I feel so alone even when people are around
I finally finished my project and I'm so proud
My mum called today and it made my whole day
I went for a walk and it actually helped
I'm starting to feel like myself again
